sentence_reviews.text: Checkpoint composition assembles a runtime model from base weights, adapters, experts, heads, tokenizers, and configuration components under explicit compatibility rules.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: LoRA and Model Soups support adapters and weight composition; they do not cover experts, heads, tokenizers, or explicit compatibility rules as a full runtime model assembly system.
sentence_reviews.notes: Add a model packaging/composition runtime source for exact definition.

sentence_reviews.text: It makes specialized model construction modular, auditable, and reproducible across deployments.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Adapter and model merging sources support modular specialization; audit/reproducibility across deployments is operational synthesis.
sentence_reviews.notes: Plausible but needs registry/provenance evidence for audit and reproducibility.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: LoRA directly supports adapting a pretrained base model with low-rank adaptation modules.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly aligned conceptually; 'stack' is an implementation detail not explicitly verified.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The available packet sources do not directly support expert routing across domains.
Adapter/merging sources support modular parameters, but not multimodal heads specifically.
sentence_reviews.notes: Needs a multimodal model composition source.

sentence_reviews.text: Version skew, preprocessing differences, licenses, and memory duplication can break nominal compatibility.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sources support operational/versioning and model-composition concerns broadly; license and preprocessing compatibility are not directly sourced.

sentence_reviews.text: Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition turns Model merging & weight-space composition into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Model Soups supports weight averaging/model merging concepts.
sentence_reviews.notes: Core dependency is well supported conceptually.

sentence_reviews.text: Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition turns Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet references do not directly support MoE routing as a checkpoint-composition dependency.
sentence_reviews.notes: Needs an MoE/routing source for core strength.

sentence_reviews.text: Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition turns Object storage, sharding & checkpoints into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: DDIA supports storage/sharding concepts; checkpoint-specific composition is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Checkpoint, adapter & expert composition turns Task vectors & parameter arithmetic into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Model merging supports weight-space combination broadly, but not task vectors/parameter arithmetic specifically.

edge_reviews.notes: Model merging is central to checkpoint composition.
Expert composition suggests MoE relevance, but packet evidence does not support core strength.
Stored checkpoints and sharded artifacts are plausible common infrastructure dependencies.
Weight-space composition is related, but task arithmetic is not directly cited.
